rationale: PR adds a complete WeChat/Weibo social channel integration. Domain layer: entity_social.go defines SocialChannelConfig (with TenantID, AppID, AppSecret, Token, EncodingAESKey, IsVerified) and SocialMessage value object plus ChannelTypeWeChat/Weibo constants. repository_social.go declares the SocialChannelConfigRepository interface. service_social.go implements SocialChannelService with CreateConfig validation (empty AppID/AppSecret/Token, invalid platform, channel-not-found via chRepo.GetByID), VerifyWeChatSignature implementing the documented sort(token,timestamp,nonce)→sha1 algorithm, VerifyWeiboSignature using sha1(appSecret+body), ProcessInboundMessage which validates OpenID/content, checks channel is not disabled, then creates an IMSession + IMMessage atomically using snowflake.NextID(), and MarkVerified for the post-handshake lifecycle. service_social_test.go adds 16 distinct tests including create success, invalid platform rejection, empty field rejection, signature verification (empty/wrong/correct for WeChat, wrong/correct for Weibo), inbound text success, empty OpenID, empty content, disabled channel rejection, image media URL, MarkVerified lifecycle. mock_social_repo.go provides the test double. Infrastructure layer adds mysql/social_channel_repo.go with the compile-time `var _ im.SocialChannelConfigRepository = (*SocialChannelConfigRepo)(nil)` check pattern. migrations/000004_social_channels.up/down.sql create the table. http/handler/social_channel.go implements CreateConfig/GetConfig/DeleteConfig under JWT and WeChat/Weibo GET/POST webhook endpoints. router.go and cmd/server/main.go wire the new handler and service. Real implementation with substantive TDD coverage.
